test_desc: Smoke - Navigate to location list page
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Wait for page to fully load; Verify page title displays 'Locations'
expected_result: Location list page loads successfully with a data table visible; Page title shows 'Locations'; Add Location button is visible and enabled

test_desc: Smoke - Create a new location with all required fields
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Click 'Add Location' button; Fill code field with 'LOC-SHOP-001'; Fill name field with 'Main Street Store'; Select type dropdown value 'shop'; Fill address field with 'Jl. Sudirman No. 123'; Fill city field with 'Jakarta'; Fill province field with 'DKI Jakarta'; Fill phone field with '021-5551234'; Select timezone dropdown value 'Asia/Jakarta'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: New location is created successfully; Success toast/notification appears with message containing 'created'; User is redirected back to location list page; New location 'Main Street Store' appears in the data table with code 'LOC-SHOP-001' and type 'shop'; Status defaults to 'active'

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Locate row with code 'LOC-SHOP-001' in the table; Click on the row or click 'View' action button
expected_result: Location detail page opens; All fields display correctly: code='LOC-SHOP-001', name='Main Street Store', type='shop', address='Jl. Sudirman No. 123', city='Jakarta', province='DKI Jakarta', phone='021-5551234', timezone='Asia/Jakarta', status='active'; Edit and Delete action buttons are visible

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Locate row with code 'LOC-SHOP-001'; Click 'Edit' action button; Change name field from 'Main Street Store' to 'Main Street Flagship Store'; Change phone field to '021-5559999'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Location is updated successfully; Success toast/notification appears with message containing 'updated'; Updated name 'Main Street Flagship Store' and phone '021-5559999' are reflected in the list; Code 'LOC-SHOP-001' remains unchanged

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create warehouse type location
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Click 'Add Location' button; Fill code field with 'LOC-WH-001'; Fill name field with 'Central Warehouse'; Select type dropdown value 'warehouse'; Fill address field with 'Jl. Industri Blok A No. 5'; Fill city field with 'Bekasi'; Fill province field with 'Jawa Barat'; Fill phone field with '021-8881234'; Select timezone dropdown value 'Asia/Jakarta'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Warehouse location is created successfully; Success notification appears; Location appears in list with type 'warehouse'; All entered data is persisted correctly

test_desc: Full CRUD - Create distribution center type location
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Click 'Add Location' button; Fill code field with 'LOC-DC-001'; Fill name field with 'East Java Distribution Center'; Select type dropdown value 'distribution_center'; Fill address field with 'Jl. Raya Surabaya-Malang KM 45'; Fill city field with 'Surabaya'; Fill province field with 'Jawa Timur'; Fill phone field with '031-7771234'; Select timezone dropdown value 'Asia/Jakarta'; Click Submit button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Distribution center location is created successfully; Success notification appears; Location appears in list with type 'distribution_center'; All three location types (shop, warehouse, distribution_center) now appear in the list

test_desc: Full CRUD - Soft delete a location
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Locate row with code 'LOC-DC-001'; Click 'Delete' action button; Confirm deletion in the confirmation dialog by clicking 'Yes' or 'Confirm'; Wait for success notification; Observe the location list
expected_result: Location is soft-deleted successfully; Success notification appears with message containing 'deleted'; Location 'LOC-DC-001' no longer appears in the default active list view; Location record still exists in database with a deletedAt timestamp (not physically removed); If a 'Show Deleted' or status filter exists, the deleted location can still be found

test_desc: Full CRUD - Verify all locations display in list with correct data
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Wait for data table to load completely; Count the number of rows in the table; Verify each row shows code, name, type, city, and status columns
expected_result: All active (non-deleted) locations appear in the list; Each row displays the correct code, name, type, city, and status; Pagination controls are visible if applicable; Table columns are sortable

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Click 'Add Location' button; Fill code field with 'LOC-SHOP-001' (already exists); Fill name field with 'Duplicate Code Test'; Select type dropdown value 'shop'; Fill address field with 'Test Address'; Fill city field with 'Test City'; Fill province field with 'Test Province'; Fill phone field with '000-0000000'; Select timezone dropdown value 'Asia/Jakarta'; Click Submit button
expected_result: Form submission is rejected; An error message appears indicating that the location code 'LOC-SHOP-001' already exists or is not unique; No new location is created; User remains on the form page with previously entered data preserved

test_desc: Edge Case - Required field validation (empty form submission)
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Click 'Add Location' button; Leave all fields empty; Click Submit button
expected_result: Form submission is rejected with validation errors; Required field indicators appear for code, name, type, and other mandatory fields; Error messages such as 'Code is required', 'Name is required', 'Type is required' are displayed; No location is created

test_desc: Edge Case - Invalid phone number format
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Click 'Add Location' button; Fill code field with 'LOC-INVALID-001'; Fill name field with 'Invalid Phone Test'; Select type dropdown value 'shop'; Fill address field with 'Test Address'; Fill city field with 'Test City'; Fill province field with 'Test Province'; Fill phone field with 'not-a-phone-number-!!!'; Select timezone dropdown value 'Asia/Jakarta'; Click Submit button
expected_result: Form submission is rejected or a validation warning appears for the phone field; Error message indicates invalid phone number format; No location is created with invalid phone data

test_desc: Edge Case - Code field max length and special characters
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/location-management/location; Click 'Add Location' button; Fill code field with a 256-character string of 'A' repeated; Fill name field with 'Max Length Code Test'; Select type dropdown value 'warehouse'; Fill remaining required fields with valid data; Click Submit button; Then repeat: Click 'Add Location' button; Fill code field with 'LOC<>!@#$%^&*()'; Fill name field with 'Special Chars Code Test'; Select type dropdown value 'shop'; Fill remaining required fields with valid data; Click Submit button
expected_result: First attempt: Rejected with a max-length validation error on the code field, or the code is truncated to allowed maximum length; Second attempt: Rejected with a validation error indicating special characters are not allowed in code field, or the code is sanitized; Neither invalid location is persisted to the database
